subject: Nullable boolean validation
old: Nullable boolean fields accepted both true/false and null/empty
new: Nullable boolean fields now enforce strict validation and reject invalid values
truth: Nullable boolean fields now have stricter validation; previously accepted values may now cause plan or apply errors.
quote: [Nullable Boolean Validation Update](#nullable-boolean-validation-update)

from_fact: nullable boolean fields accepted both true/false and null/empty
nullable boolean fields now enforce strict validation and reject invalid values

subject: provider configuration
truth: Stop using endpoints.opsworks in provider configuration; it is no longer supported.
quote: endpoints.opsworks – removed following AWS OpsWorks Stacks End of Life.

subject: provider configuration
truth: Stop using endpoints.simpledb or endpoints.sdb in provider configuration; they are no longer supported.
quote: endpoints.simpledb and endpoints.sdb – removed due to the removal of Amazon SimpleDB support.

subject: provider configuration
truth: Stop using endpoints.worklink in provider configuration; it is no longer supported.
quote: endpoints.worklink – removed due to the removal of Amazon Worklink support.

subject: boolean arguments
truth: Stop using 0 or 1 to represent boolean values in arguments; only "", true, or false are now accepted.
quote: Update your configuration to _only_ use `""`, `true`, or `false` if you use the arguments below _and_ you are using `0` or `1` to represent boolean values:

subject: aws_accessanalyzer_archive_rule

subject: aws_worklink_website_certificate_authority_association

subject: S3 global endpoint
truth: Stop using the global S3 endpoint in `us-east-1`; the `s3_us_east_1_regional_endpoint` set to `legacy` is deprecated and will be removed in v7.0.0, so you must use the regional endpoint instead.
quote: Support for the global S3 endpoint is deprecated. This affects S3 resources in `us-east-1` (excluding directory buckets) when `s3_us_east_1_regional_endpoint` is set to `legacy`. `s3_us_east_1_regional_endpoint` will be removed in `v7.0.0`.

subject: data source aws_ami
old: allowed most_recent=true without owners or image-id/owner-id filter (only warning)
new: requires owners or a filter with image-id or owner-id (error)
truth: When using `most_recent = true`, you must now include `owners` or a `filter` that identifies the image by `image-id` or `owner-id` or Terraform will error.
quote: When using `most_recent = true`, your configuration **must now include** `owners` or a `filter` that identifies the image by `image-id` or `owner-id`.

from_fact: allowed most_recent=true without owners or image-id/owner-id filter (only warning)
requires owners or a filter with image-id or owner-id (error)

subject: data source aws_batch_compute_environment
truth: Replace `compute_environment_name` with `name` in aws_batch_compute_environment data source.
quote: `compute_environment_name` has been renamed to `name`.

subject: data source aws_ecs_task_definition
truth: Remove `inference_accelerator` from aws_ecs_task_definition data source as it is no longer supported.
quote: Remove `inference_accelerator`—it is no longer supported. Amazon Elastic Inference reached end of life in April 2024.

subject: data source aws_ecs_task_execution
truth: Remove `inference_accelerator_overrides` from aws_ecs_task_execution data source as it is no longer supported.
quote: Remove `inference_accelerator_overrides`—it is no longer supported. Amazon Elastic Inference reached end of life in April 2024.

subject: data source aws_globalaccelerator_accelerator
new: id is computed only and cannot be set
truth: `id` is now computed only and can no longer be set manually in aws_globalaccelerator_accelerator data source.
quote: `id` is now **computed only** and can no longer be set manually.

from_fact: id is computed only and cannot be set

subject: data source aws_identitystore_group
truth: Remove `filter` from aws_identitystore_group data source and use `alternate_identifier` instead.
quote: Remove `filter`—it is no longer supported. To locate a group, update your configuration to use `alternate_identifier` instead.

subject: data source aws_identitystore_user
truth: Remove `filter` from aws_identitystore_user data source and use `alternate_identifier` instead.
quote: Remove `filter`—it is no longer supported. To locate a user, update your configuration to use `alternate_identifier` instead.

subject: data source aws_kms_secret
truth: The aws_kms_secret data source functionality was removed in v2.0.0 and will be removed entirely in a future version.
quote: The functionality for this data source was removed in **v2.0.0** and the data source will be removed in a future version.

subject: data source aws_launch_template
truth: Remove `elastic_gpu_specifications` from aws_launch_template data source as it is no longer supported.
quote: Remove `elastic_gpu_specifications`—it is no longer supported.

subject: data source aws_launch_template
truth: Remove `elastic_inference_accelerator` from aws_launch_template data source as it is no longer supported.
quote: Remove `elastic_inference_accelerator`—it is no longer supported.

subject: kibana_endpoint
truth: Stop using kibana_endpoint; use the Dashboards path at /_dashboards/ on the domain endpoint instead.
quote: Remove `kibana_endpoint`—it is no longer supported. AWS OpenSearch Service no longer uses Kibana endpoints. The service now uses **Dashboards**, accessible at the `/_dashboards/` path on the domain endpoint.

subject: aws_opensearchserverless_security_config data source saml_options
new: saml_options as a list of nested blocks
truth: Reference saml_options as a list: change saml_options.session_timeout to saml_options[0].session_timeout.
quote: Treat `saml_options` as a list of nested blocks instead of a single-nested block. The data source configuration itself does not change. However, now, include an index when referencing it. For example, update `saml_options.session_timeout` to `saml_options[0].session_timeout`.

from_fact: saml_options as a list of nested blocks

subject: aws_quicksight_data_set data source tags_all
truth: Stop using tags_all on aws_quicksight_data_set; it is no longer supported.
quote: Remove `tags_all`—it is no longer supported.

subject: aws_region data source name
truth: Stop using name; use region instead on aws_region data source.
quote: `name` has been deprecated. Use `region` instead.

subject: aws_s3_bucket data source region
truth: Stop using region on aws_s3_bucket data source; use bucket_region instead.
quote: [Data Source `aws_s3_bucket`](#data-source-aws_s3_bucket)

subject: aws_service_discovery_service data source tags_all
truth: Stop using tags_all on aws_service_discovery_service; it is no longer supported.
quote: Remove `tags_all`—it is no longer supported.

subject: aws_servicequotas_templates data source region
truth: Stop using region; use aws_region instead on aws_servicequotas_templates data source.
quote: `region` has been deprecated. Use `aws_region` instead.

subject: aws_ssmincidents_replication_set data source region
truth: Stop using region; use regions instead on aws_ssmincidents_replication_set data source.
quote: `region` has been deprecated. Use `regions` instead.

subject: aws_vpc_endpoint_service data source region
truth: Stop using region; use service_region instead on aws_vpc_endpoint_service data source.
quote: `region` has been deprecated. Use `service_region` instead.

subject: aws_vpc_peering_connection data source region
truth: Stop using region; use requester_region instead on aws_vpc_peering_connection data source.
quote: `region` has been deprecated. Use `requester_region` instead.

subject: aws_api_gateway_account resource reset_on_delete
truth: Stop using reset_on_delete; the destroy operation now always resets API Gateway account settings. Use a removed block to retain old behaviour.
quote: Remove `reset_on_delete`—it is no longer supported. The destroy operation will now always reset the API Gateway account settings by default.

associative: keep api gateway settings on delete

subject: aws_api_gateway_deployment resource stage_name, stage_description, canary_settings
old: stage_name, stage_description, canary_settings attributes on aws_api_gateway_deployment
truth: Stop using stage_name, stage_description, and canary_settings on aws_api_gateway_deployment; use the aws_api_gateway_stage resource instead.
quote: Use the `aws_api_gateway_stage` resource if your configuration uses any of the following, which have been removed from the `aws_api_gateway_deployment` resource: - `stage_name` - `stage_description` - `canary_settings`

from_fact: stage_name, stage_description, canary_settings attributes on aws_api_gateway_deployment

subject: aws_api_gateway_deployment resource invoke_url and execution_arn
old: invoke_url and execution_arn attributes on aws_api_gateway_deployment
truth: Stop using invoke_url and execution_arn on aws_api_gateway_deployment; use the aws_api_gateway_stage resource instead.
quote: Remove `invoke_url` and `execution_arn`—they are no longer supported. Use the `aws_api_gateway_stage` resource instead.

from_fact: invoke_url and execution_arn attributes on aws_api_gateway_deployment

subject: aws_batch_compute_environment
truth: Replace compute_environment_name with name and compute_environment_name_prefix with name_prefix in aws_batch_compute_environment.
quote: Replace any usage of `compute_environment_name` with `name` and `compute_environment_name_prefix` with `name_prefix` as they have been renamed.

subject: aws_batch_job_queue
truth: Stop using compute_environments in aws_batch_job_queue; use compute_environment_order configuration blocks instead.
quote: Remove `compute_environments`—it is no longer supported. Use `compute_environment_order` configuration blocks instead.

subject: aws_cloudformation_stack_set_instance
truth: Stop using region in aws_cloudformation_stack_set_instance; use stack_set_instance_region instead.
quote: `region` has been deprecated. Use `stack_set_instance_region` instead.

subject: aws_cloudfront_response_headers_policy
truth: Do not set a value for etag in aws_cloudfront_response_headers_policy; it is now computed only.
quote: Do not set a value for `etag` as it is now computed only.

subject: aws_cognito_user_in_group
truth: Use a comma-delimited string of user_pool_id,group_name,username as the id for aws_cognito_user_in_group.
quote: For the `id`, use a comma-delimited string concatenating `user_pool_id`, `group_name`, and `username`.

subject: aws_config_aggregate_authorization
truth: Stop using region in aws_config_aggregate_authorization; use authorized_aws_region instead.
quote: `region` has been deprecated. Use `authorized_aws_region` instead.

subject: aws_cur_report_definition
truth: s3_prefix is now required in aws_cur_report_definition.
quote: `s3_prefix` is now required.

subject: aws_db_instance
old: using character_set_name with replicate_source_db, restore_to_point_in_time, s3_import, or snapshot_identifier
truth: Do not use character_set_name together with replicate_source_db, restore_to_point_in_time, s3_import, or snapshot_identifier in aws_db_instance.
quote: Do not use `character_set_name` with `replicate_source_db`, `restore_to_point_in_time`, `s3_import`, or `snapshot_identifier`. The combination is no longer valid.

from_fact: using character_set_name with replicate_source_db, restore_to_point_in_time, s3_import, or snapshot_identifier

subject: aws_dms_endpoint
truth: Stop using s3_settings in aws_dms_endpoint; use the aws_dms_s3_endpoint resource instead.
quote: `s3_settings` has been removed. Use the `aws_dms_s3_endpoint` resource rather than `s3_settings` of `aws_dms_endpoint`.

subject: aws_dx_gateway_association
truth: Stop using vpn_gateway_id in aws_dx_gateway_association; use associated_gateway_id instead.
quote: Remove `vpn_gateway_id`—it is no longer supported. Use `associated_gateway_id` instead.

subject: aws_dx_hosted_connection
truth: Stop using region in aws_dx_hosted_connection; use connection_region instead.
quote: `region` has been deprecated. Use `connection_region` instead.

subject: aws_ecs_task_definition
truth: Remove inference_accelerator from aws_ecs_task_definition; Amazon Elastic Inference reached end of life.
quote: Remove `inference_accelerator`—it is no longer supported. Amazon Elastic Inference reached end of life in April 2024.

subject: aws_eip
truth: Stop using vpc in aws_eip; use domain instead.
quote: Remove `vpc`—it is no longer supported. Use `domain` instead.

subject: resolve_conflicts
truth: Stop using resolve_conflicts; use resolve_conflicts_on_create and resolve_conflicts_on_update instead.
quote: Remove `resolve_conflicts`—it is no longer supported. Use `resolve_conflicts_on_create` and `resolve_conflicts_on_update` instead.

subject: auth_token_update_strategy
truth: auth_token_update_strategy no longer has a default value; if auth_token is set, auth_token_update_strategy must also be explicitly configured.
quote: `auth_token_update_strategy` no longer has a default value. If `auth_token` is set, it must also be explicitly configured.

subject: engine value case sensitivity
truth: In v7.0.0, engine values must be entirely lowercase; uppercase values will fail plan-time validation.
quote: The ability to provide an uppercase `engine` value is deprecated. In `v7.0.0`, plan-time validation of `engine` will require an entirely lowercase value to match the returned value from the AWS API without diff suppression.

subject: log_group_name
truth: Stop using log_group_name; use log_destination instead.
quote: Remove `log_group_name`—it is no longer supported. Use `log_destination` instead.

subject: datasources
truth: Stop using datasources in aws_guardduty_detector; use the aws_guardduty_detector_feature resource instead.
quote: `datasources` is deprecated. Use the `aws_guardduty_detector_feature` resource instead.

subject: auto_enable
truth: Stop using auto_enable in aws_guardduty_organization_configuration; it is no longer supported.
quote: Remove `auto_enable`—it is no longer supported.

subject: auto_enable_organization_members
truth: auto_enable_organization_members is now required in aws_guardduty_organization_configuration.
quote: `auto_enable_organization_members` is now required.

subject: user_data hashing
truth: user_data is no longer hashed and is stored in clear text; do not include passwords or sensitive information in user_data.
quote: `user_data` no longer applies hashing and is now stored in clear text. **Do not include passwords or sensitive information** in `user_data`, as it will be visible in plaintext.

subject: cpu_core_count and cpu_threads_per_core
truth: Stop using cpu_core_count and cpu_threads_per_core; use the cpu_options block with core_count and threads_per_core instead.
quote: Remove `cpu_core_count` and `cpu_threads_per_core`—they are no longer supported. Instead, use the `cpu_options` configuration block with `core_count` and `threads_per_core`.

subject: aws_kinesis_analytics_application
truth: Stop using aws_kinesis_analytics_application; use aws_kinesisanalyticsv2_application instead as the old resource is deprecated and will be removed.
quote: This resource is deprecated and will be removed in a future version.

subject: elastic_gpu_specifications
truth: Stop using elastic_gpu_specifications; it has been removed because Amazon Elastic Graphics reached end of life.
quote: Remove `elastic_gpu_specifications`—it is no longer supported. Amazon Elastic Graphics reached end of life in January 2024.

subject: elastic_inference_accelerator
truth: Stop using elastic_inference_accelerator; it has been removed because Amazon Elastic Inference reached end of life.
quote: Remove `elastic_inference_accelerator`—it is no longer supported. Amazon Elastic Inference reached end of life in April 2024.

subject: aws_lb_listener mutual_authentication fields
old: mutual_authentication fields (advertise_trust_store_ca_names, ignore_client_certificate_expiry, trust_store_arn) could be set regardless of mode
new: mutual_authentication fields can only be set when mode is verify
truth: For mutual_authentication, advertise_trust_store_ca_names, ignore_client_certificate_expiry, and trust_store_arn can now only be set when mode is verify.
quote: For `mutual_authentication`, `advertise_trust_store_ca_names`, `ignore_client_certificate_expiry`, and `trust_store_arn` can now only be set when `mode` is `verify`.

from_fact: mutual_authentication fields (advertise_trust_store_ca_names, ignore_client_certificate_expiry, trust_store_arn) could be set regardless of mode
mutual_authentication fields can only be set when mode is verify

subject: aws_lb_listener trust_store_arn requirement
old: trust_store_arn was optional when mode is verify
new: trust_store_arn is required when mode is verify
truth: trust_store_arn is required when mode is verify.
quote: `trust_store_arn` is required when `mode` is `verify`.

from_fact: trust_store_arn was optional when mode is verify
trust_store_arn is required when mode is verify

subject: aws_media_store_container
truth: Stop using aws_media_store_container; it is deprecated and will be removed. Migrate to Amazon S3 or AWS Elemental MediaPackage.
quote: The `aws_simpledb_domain` resource has been removed, as the [AWS SDK for Go v2](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/sdk-for-go/v2/developer-guide/welcome.html) no longer supports Amazon SimpleDB.

subject: aws_media_store_container_policy
truth: Stop using aws_media_store_container_policy; it is deprecated and will be removed. Migrate to Amazon S3 or AWS Elemental MediaPackage.
quote: The `aws_simpledb_domain` resource has been removed, as the [AWS SDK for Go v2](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/sdk-for-go/v2/developer-guide/welcome.html) no longer supports Amazon SimpleDB.

subject: aws_networkmanager_core_network base_policy_region
truth: Stop using base_policy_region; use base_policy_regions instead.
quote: Remove `base_policy_region`—it is no longer supported. Use `base_policy_regions` instead.

subject: aws_opensearch_domain kibana_endpoint
truth: Stop using kibana_endpoint; it has been removed. OpenSearch uses Dashboards accessible at /_dashboards/ instead.
quote: Remove `kibana_endpoint`—it is no longer supported. AWS OpenSearch Service does not use Kibana endpoints (i.e., `_plugin/kibana`). Instead, OpenSearch uses Dashboards, accessible at the path `/_dashboards/` on the domain endpoint.

subject: aws_opensearchserverless_security_config saml_options
old: saml_options was a single-nested block (no index needed)
new: saml_options is now a list of nested blocks (index required)
truth: Stop referencing saml_options without an index; use saml_options[0].session_timeout instead of saml_options.session_timeout.
quote: Treat `saml_options` as a list of nested blocks instead of a single-nested block.

from_fact: saml_options was a single-nested block (no index needed)
saml_options is now a list of nested blocks (index required)

subject: aws_paymentcryptography_key key_attributes and key_modes_of_use
old: key_attributes and key_attributes.key_modes_of_use were single-nested blocks (no index needed)
new: key_attributes and key_attributes.key_modes_of_use are now lists of nested blocks (index required)
truth: Stop referencing key_attributes and key_attributes.key_modes_of_use without an index; use key_attributes[0].key_modes_of_use[0].decrypt instead.
quote: Treat the `key_attributes` and `key_attributes.key_modes_of_use` as lists of nested blocks instead of single-nested blocks.

from_fact: key_attributes and key_attributes.key_modes_of_use were single-nested blocks (no index needed)
key_attributes and key_attributes.key_modes_of_use are now lists of nested blocks (index required)

subject: encrypted
truth: Stop relying on encrypted defaulting to false; it now defaults to true, which may cause unexpected encryption costs or behavior.
quote: `encrypted` now defaults to `true`.

subject: publicly_accessible
truth: Stop relying on publicly_accessible defaulting to true; it now defaults to false, which may break network access expectations.
quote: `publicly_accessible` now defaults to `false`.

subject: snapshot_copy
truth: Stop using snapshot_copy in the resource; use the aws_redshift_snapshot_copy resource instead.
quote: Remove `snapshot_copy`—it is no longer supported. Use the `aws_redshift_snapshot_copy` resource instead.

subject: logging
truth: Stop using logging in the resource; use the aws_redshift_logging resource instead.
quote: Remove `logging`—it is no longer supported. Use the `aws_redshift_logging` resource instead.

subject: cluster_public_key, cluster_revision_number, endpoint
new: read only, should not be set
truth: Stop setting cluster_public_key, cluster_revision_number, or endpoint in configuration; they are now read-only attributes.
quote: `cluster_public_key`, `cluster_revision_number`, and `endpoint` are now read only and should not be set.

from_fact: read only, should not be set

subject: aws_redshift_service_account resource
truth: Stop using the aws_redshift_service_account resource; use a service principal name in IAM policies instead.
quote: The `aws_redshift_service_account` resource has been removed.

subject: regions_of_interest.bounding_box in aws_rekognition_stream_processor
truth: Stop referencing regions_of_interest[0].bounding_box.height; use regions_of_interest[0].bounding_box[0].height instead.
quote: Treat `regions_of_interest.bounding_box` as a list of nested blocks instead of a single-nested block.

subject: policy, policy.az, policy.hardware, policy.software, policy.region in aws_resiliencehub_resiliency_policy
truth: Stop referencing policy.az.rpo; use policy[0].az[0].rpo instead.
quote: Treat the following as lists of nested blocks instead of single-nested blocks:

subject: region in aws_s3_bucket
truth: Stop using region on aws_s3_bucket; use bucket_region instead.
quote: `bucket_region` has been added and should be used instead of `region`, which is now used for [Enhanced Region Support](enhanced-region-support.html).

subject: id in aws_sagemaker_image_version
new: comma-delimited string of image_name and version
truth: Stop using id as a single value; use a comma-delimited string of image_name and version for the composite id.
quote: For the `id`, use a comma-delimited string concatenating `image_name` and `version`.

from_fact: comma-delimited string of image_name and version

subject: region in aws_servicequotas_template
truth: Stop using region on aws_servicequotas_template; use aws_region instead.
quote: `region` has been deprecated. Use `aws_region` instead.

subject: block_duration_minutes in aws_spot_instance_request
truth: Stop using block_duration_minutes on aws_spot_instance_request; it is no longer supported.
quote: Remove `block_duration_minutes`—it is no longer supported.

subject: instance_id in aws_ssm_association
truth: Stop using instance_id on aws_ssm_association; use targets instead.
quote: Remove `instance_id`—it is no longer supported. Use `targets` instead.

subject: region in aws_ssmincidents_replication_set
truth: Stop using region on aws_ssmincidents_replication_set; use regions instead.
quote: `region` has been deprecated. Use `regions` instead.

subject: definition in aws_verifiedpermissions_schema
truth: Stop referencing definition.value; use definition[0].value instead.
quote: Treat `definition` as a list of nested blocks instead of a single-nested block.
